region_groups.name: South Central
region_groups.description: South-central plains and Gulf-adjacent hot-summer climates—major cattle, cotton, and energy cropping with distinct frost timing from the humid Southeast.

regions.name: Texas
regions.description: Texas spans arid west to humid east—citrus and winter greens in the south; melons, peppers, and pecans statewide; Panhandle and High Plains seasons run shorter.

regions.name: Oklahoma
regions.description: Oklahoma blends Southern Plains wheat and cattle country with growing specialty crops—peaches and watermelons peak in summer after a quick spring warm-up.
